$comment: Full audit hook configuration. The observability/ directory must be in your project root.

PostToolUse.description: Audit telemetry: captures tool calls, agent spawns, code changes to QDrant
Eval telemetry: runs tests and lint after .py file changes

Stop.description: Audit telemetry: aggregates session summary and flushes metrics

PreToolUse.description: Agent versioning: snapshots changed agent definitions before telemetry starts
Audit directives: reads pending directives and injects them into agent context. MUST be synchronous — async hooks cannot return additionalContext.
